page_content:
Formerly: ENMA489Z.

ENMA445 Liquid Crystals and Structured Soft Materials (3 Credits) Elective course on the properties and behavior of liquid crystals and related soft materials, and their relationship to biomaterials and to applications.

Prerequisite: MATH246, PHYS270, and PHYS271.

Restriction: Permission of ENGR-Materials Science & Engineering department.

Credit Only Granted for. ENMA445 or ENMA489L.
